headline: UBS Maintains Buy on Arch Capital Group, Raises Price Target to $120
summary: UBS  analyst Brian Meredith   maintains Arch Capital Group (NASDAQ:ACGL) with a Buy and raises the price target from $114 to $120.

raw.headline: UBS Maintains Buy on Arch Capital Group, Raises Price Target to $120
raw.summary: UBS  analyst Brian Meredith   maintains Arch Capital Group (NASDAQ:ACGL) with a Buy and raises the price target from $114 to $120.

headline: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods Maintains Market Perform on Arch Capital Group, Lowers Price Target to $99
summary: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods  analyst Meyer Shields   maintains Arch Capital Group (NASDAQ:ACGL) with a Market Perform and lowers the price target from $102 to $99.
